response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video for vocal music. 2. Identified five distinct scenes based on setting changes. 3. Confirmed that all audio in the video consists of conversational dialogue and instrumental background music/sound effects. 4. No vocal songs detected, therefore no lyrics lookup performed.
response.global_summary: The video is an animated sketch featuring various characters having conversations in different settings (a kitchen, a carriage, and a campfire). There is no vocal music throughout the entire video.

scenes.description: Animated characters talking in a kitchen setting.
A stylized logo for T.A.N. The Autofister Network is displayed with glitch effects. Background audio is instrumental.
The animated characters continue their conversation while inside a virtual carriage.
A title card and text summary 'PREVIOUSLY ON: HALF A FORTNITE AWAY FROM DEATH' are displayed. Background music is instrumental.
The characters are sitting around a campfire in a forest setting, continuing their conversation. There are ambient sound effects but no vocal music.
